name: hipfire-arch-port
description: Port hipfire compute kernels to a new RDNA / CDNA architecture (gfx1201/gfx1200/gfx94x/gfx1150/etc.). Captures the WMMA operand-shape matrix, builtin name table, dispatch routing convention, validation procedure, and known correctness traps. Use this when adding support for a new GPU arch or fixing arch-specific kernel codegen failures.

requires.hardware: the target GPU arch (the port cannot be merged without empirical channel-test on real hardware)
